article_meta.title: Why the US needs China's rare earths16 October 2025ShareSaveAyeshea PereraAsia Digital Editor, Singapore ShareSaveGetty

reasoning: The model likely misread a subtle Lean Left tilt as Center and was overconfident. Its reasoning and indicators were vague and did not cite specific author prose; they relied on general claims about balance rather than concrete textual evidence.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article reads as mostly explanatory but includes authorial critiques of Trump’s approach (e.g., adversarial tone, Greenland control remarks), suggesting Lean Left; the model’s Center call is at most one class off.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.85 implies a clear, unambiguous Center lean; signals are mixed/subtle, so confidence should be ~0.6–0.7, not 0.85.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Indicators are generic (e.g., ‘balanced presentation’) and do not quote or point to the author’s specific wording; no concrete authorial phrases are cited.
